question: Configure the network interface eth0 with static IP address 172.16.120.10/24 and bring it up.
hint: Use ip addr add and ip link set up.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if ip -o addr show eth0 | grep -q '172\.16\.120\.10/24'; then
    if ip link show eth0 | grep -q 'state UP'; then
        exit 0
    fi
fi
exit 1

question: Set the default gateway to 172.16.120.1 for interface eth0.
hint: Use ip route add default via.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if ip route show default | grep -q 'via 172\.16\.120\.1 dev eth0'; then
    exit 0
fi
exit 1

question: Configure DNS server to 1.1.1.1 by ensuring /etc/resolv.conf contains a nameserver line with 1.1.1.1.
hint: You can echo the line into the file.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if grep -q '^nameserver 1\.1\.1\.1' /etc/resolv.conf; then
    exit 0
fi
exit 1

question: Install dnsmasq and configure it to provide DHCP addresses from 172.16.120.100 to 172.16.120.254 with a lease time of 12 hours.
hint: Install package, edit /etc/dnsmasq.conf, add dhcp-range line, then restart service.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if dpkg -l | grep -q '^ii  dnsmasq'; then
    if grep -q '^dhcp-range=172\.16\.120\.100,172\.16\.120\.254,12h' /etc/dnsmasq.conf; then
        exit 0
    fi
fi
exit 1

question: Verify that you can reach the gateway (172.16.120.1) by sending two ICMP echo requests and receiving replies.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if ping -c 2 172.16.120.1 > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    exit 0
fi
exit 1
